description: You are a Risk Management Director at Meridian Logistics Partners, LLC, a third-party logistics provider based in Weehawken, NJ. Create a formal Business Continuity Plan (BCP) document that meets ISO 22301 and SOC 2 requirements using Apache OpenOffice Writer. Use the company information, key contacts, critical systems, and risk data provided in /home/ga/Documents/company_info.json. The document must follow standard ISO 22301 BCP structure with all required sections properly formatted. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/Meridian_BCP_2024.odt. Login: username ga, no password required.
